headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock Worth Investigating and 2 We Question
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Teledyne Promotes Michelle Hildyard to General Manager of Teledyne Raymarine and Teledyne FLIR Marine
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., July 02, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) today announced the promotion of Michelle Hildyard to General Manager of its Teledyne Raymarine and Teledyne FLIR Marine brands.
